channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court Overturns Lower Court's Block on Alabama's Congressional Map Again
item.description: The district court interfered with Alabama's efforts to conduct its 2026 elections under approved maps.

item.title: Trump Has Lost the Thread on Iran
item.description: If the war was a tactical triumph, the cease-fire has been a disappointment.

item.title: Johnson says GOP has another filibuster-proof package coming after immigration funding advances
item.description: Setbacks on Republicans' second filibuster-proof package in Congress are not deterring them from pursuing a third focused on combating fraud and affor...

item.title: Private sector added 122K jobs in May, exceeding expectations
item.description: Private sector hiring expanded at a strong pace, adding 122,000 jobs in May, according to a report released Wednesday by payroll provider ADP.
